title: ochna rotundifolia
intro: Ochna rotundifolia, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant, is a small, deciduous shrub native to southern Africa, characterized by its round leaves and distinctive red berries. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Ochna rotundifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
